extraction_notes: Available sources (TCRF and Wikipedia) contain no gameplay design documentation, level sequencing data, spatial structure information, or rhythm analysis. TCRF provides only technical debug information (teleport codes, coordinate systems) and unused graphics notes. Wikipedia disambiguation page contains no Willow NES gameplay details—only confirms 1989 Capcom NES platform release and movie license basis. Insufficient documentation to extract requested element introduction order, tension cycles, spatial conventions, difficulty curves, or level design patterns.
